overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a journey on the NCART metro system through Night City. The clip transitions from the interior of a crowded train car to an exterior view of the futuristic cityscape, ending with arrival at Glen Ebunike station.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro car interior with seated passengers

agents.ego_description: sitting in the metro car observing the other passengers and surroundings

notable_agents.action: person lying unconscious on the floor near the seats
three passengers sitting on the bench seat, one with distinctive pink hair

entered.detail: brown padded bench seats along the sides of the metro car
illuminated advertisement screen showing 'THIS YEAR' and casino promotion
yellow vertical poles for standing passengers to hold
digital information screen showing route and station information
glass doors with green frames leading to adjacent car or exit

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a futuristic metro car with artificial lighting. Passengers sit on brown bench seats while a person lies on the floor nearby. Digital advertisements and overhead displays illuminate the interior as the camera slowly pans across the car.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro car standing area near exit doors

events.description: camera begins moving forward through the train car toward the exit area

agents.ego_description: moving through the train car past standing passengers toward the door area

notable_agents.action: passenger standing and holding onto the overhead handrail
passengers sitting on the side bench looking at their phones

entered.detail: litter and empty bottles scattered on the floor near the door

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward through the metro car, passing from the seated area to the standing section near the doors. Trash is visible on the floor as the view shifts toward the exit, with passengers standing and holding rails.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated railway with futuristic cityscape view

events.description: view transitions from train interior to exterior cityscape through the window
train curves around a large industrial building, changing the view angle

agents.ego_description: looking out the window at the passing cityscape and skyline

entered.detail: tall dark skyscraper with illuminated '02' signage near the top
large red neon advertisement sign on building rooftop
massive rust-colored industrial structure with geometric patterns
metal railings and edge of the elevated train track

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to the exterior view from the moving train, revealing the Night City skyline at night. The train travels on elevated tracks past towering skyscrapers with neon signage and massive industrial structures, curving around buildings as the city lights blur past.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro station platform with neon signage

events.description: train arrives at Glen Ebunike station platform

agents.ego_description: waiting as the train arrives at the station platform

notable_agents.action: security guard or passenger standing on the platform near the glass barrier

entered.detail: concrete platform with yellow safety markings and glass barriers
large red neon sign reading 'GLEN EBUNIKE' mounted on the station wall
transparent safety barriers separating the platform from the tracks
yellow and black hazard stripes along the platform edge

segments.scene_description: The train arrives at Glen Ebunike station, transitioning from the open city view to the covered platform. A prominent red neon sign identifies the station as the train slows to a stop, with waiting passengers visible behind the glass platform barriers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sterile interior of a futuristic metro car out into the neon-drenched expanse of the Night City skyline. It begins by panning across a crowded car illuminated by digital advertisements, passing seated passengers and a person lying on the floor. As the camera moves forward through the standing area and past debris on the floor, the perspective shifts through the exit to reveal the exterior world. The scene then expands into a sweeping view of towering skyscrapers and industrial structures as the train curves along elevated tracks under the glow of city lights. Finally, the open cityscape narrows as the train glides into the covered Glen Ebunike station, slowing to a stop beneath a prominent red neon sign.
